beers.name: Ascension
beers.description: IPA - American 6.7% ABV A modern take on a Northern-style IPA, highlighting a crisp, hoppy profile, balanced bitterness, with aroma notes of citrus and tropical fruits.

beers.name: Mordax
beers.description: IPA - New England 6.6% ABV Dry-hopped with Anchovy and Superdelic hops

beers.name: Greenway
beers.description: IPA - Session New England 4.7% ABV Strata + Nelson Sauvin hops

beers.name: Warp And Weft
beers.description: IPA - Black 7% ABV Collaboration with Con es Puma! Layered with citrus, pine, white grapes, dank resin, and roasted coffee bean notes.

beers.name: Alternate Continuum
beers.description: Farmhouse Ale - Saison 8.2% ABV Aged in Chardonnay white wine barrels for 13 months. Wine character flavors, with notes of apricot and peach, pineapple, and white flowers. A gentle toast from the oak adds layers of vanilla, coconut, and a subtle spice.

beers.name: Phantom Project Vol. 1
beers.description: IPA - Triple New England 9% ABV Brewed with Omage Yeast Propper Phantasm and hopped with Superdelic, Idaho 7, and Nelson Sauvin, this Triple Hazy IPA opens with huge guava aromatics, followed by layers of passion fruit and a citrus finish that hints at grapefruit.

beers.name: Blue Demon
beers.description: Lager - Mexican 5.5% ABV Mexican Lager 5.5% abv.
